Params: {1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryFallNew.prefab', 2: '2'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiDuihualiziLoopWhite.prefab', 2: '2', 5: '11'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiDuihualiziLoopWhite.prefab', 2: '2', 5: '13'}
{3: 'Through the billowing fog, Veronica hears that voice again.'}
{3: 'Strange, foreign, yet oddly familiar.'}
{3: 'She can no longer remember how many times this voice has tried to tempt her.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Veronica', 3: 'Who are you?!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'The voice in the fog continues to echo, repeating the strange words over and over.'}
{3: 'She grips her lance tight and steps into the fog.'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryFallNew.prefab'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiDuihualiziLoopWhite.prefab', 5: '11'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiDuihualiziLoopWhite.prefab', 5: '13'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1473.jpg'}
{3: 'The same familiar streets of the town she has always protected greet her.'}
{3: 'Veronica\'s footsteps echo through the empty streets, just as they do during her regular patrols through the fog as the sheriff.'}
{3: 'Every house along the streets she walks radiates a warm, welcoming glow.'}
{3: 'Doors and windows are sealed tight, shutting out the thick fog that drifts through the streets.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Shadow Creature', 3: 'Rargh—rargh—', 4: '1'}
{3: 'A twisted shadow lunges from the fog, striking at her back.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Veronica', 3: 'Hah, is that the best you\'ve got?', 4: '2'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiHitNew.prefab', 2: '2', 3: '1', 5: '1'}
{1: 'PanelActor1Shake'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiDuihualiziEndRed.prefab', 2: '2', 3: '1'}
{3: 'A sharp flash of light cuts through the air as her lance strikes down the creature in the fog. The shadow creature retreats, and the street returns to its peaceful silence.'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiDuihualiziEndRed.prefab', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiHitNew.prefab', 4: '1', 5: '1'}
{3: 'She looks up at the windows glowing with warm light, knowing that behind each one is someone she has sworn to protect.'}
{2: 'Veronica', 3: 'Don\'t worry. You\'ll all be safe.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Veronica', 3: 'All I can do is keep you safe... every last one of you.', 4: '2'}
{3: 'A sense of relief washes over her. No matter what happens, this town remains safe under her watch.'}
{3: 'As long as she keeps doing what she\'s doing now: treading the fog, cutting down monsters...'}
{3: 'She just has to keep moving forward...'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png', 3: '0', 4: '0.6', 5: '0'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUiFight/FxUiShixianraodong02.prefab'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Suddenly, every light in those windows goes out at once. The entire street plunges into darkness as shadowy figures drift through the fog.'}
{3: 'But those figures aren\'t monsters. They are the familiar residents she knows.'}
{3: 'They line the street in neat rows, as if welcoming her arrival... or lying in wait to hunt her down.'}
{2: 'Strange Townsfolk', 3: 'Siren... Bloodthirsty Siren...', 4: '1', 5: '2', 6: '3', 7: '4'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Veronica', 3: 'Don\'t stay in the fog! You can\'t resist the Mist\'s influence!', 4: '15'}
{2: 'Veronica', 3: 'All of you, get back inside! Lock your doors and windows!', 4: '15'}
{3: 'But the figures in the fog remain frozen in place, continuing to chant those eerie words over and over.'}
{3: 'It\'s as if they can\'t understand a word she\'s saying, and they no longer recognize the face of the sheriff who has always protected them.'}
{3: 'Soon, the frenzied chanting of the crowd mingles with the sinister voice echoing in her mind.'}
{3: 'She fights back with every ounce of willpower she has, desperately resisting the sinister voice in her head.'}
{3: 'But the voice keeps droning on with the same monotonous chant, growing louder and louder and slowly eating away at what little sanity she has left.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'More and more shadowy figures gather before her.'}
{2: 'Strange Townsfolk', 3: 'Accept... blood... offer...', 4: '1', 5: '2', 6: '3', 7: '4'}
{2: 'Strange Townsfolk', 3: 'Bloodthirsty Siren...', 4: '1', 5: '2', 6: '3', 7: '4'}
{1: '1', 3: 'As the crowd\'s whispers surround her, Veronica begins to feel a strange, alien sensation stirring within her.'}
{3: 'An uncontrollable craving for blood is burning her throat like wildfire.'}
{3: 'The twisted craving pulses through her body as she hungers for the crimson essence that flows from the living.'}
{3: 'Driven by this terrible hunger, she steps forward into the fog, searching for what she now craves.'}
{3: 'But the shadowy figures begin to fade away before her very eyes, dissolving into nothing.'}
{2: 'Veronica', 3: 'Give me... blood...', 4: '15'}
{3: 'Through the fog, a gray figure emerges.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStoryFront/BgStoryFront17.png', 4: '4'}
{3: 'Approaching Veronica, you pick up her lance and slash your wrist.'}
{3: 'As crimson trickles down your wrist, Veronica catches the metallic-sweet scent in the air.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStoryFront/BgStoryFront17.png', 4: '4', 5: '1'}
{1: '1007', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png', 3: '0', 4: '0.7', 5: '0'}
{2: 'Right here.'}
{3: 'You bring your wrist to Veronica\'s lips.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStoryBianHong.prefab', 2: '2'}
{3: 'Finally, she can resist no longer and bites down on your warm wrist, greedily drinking the sweet blood.'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStoryBianHong.prefab'}
{3: 'The restless, violent power raging within her seems to gradually calm, nourished by your life force.'}
{3: 'You draw closer, gripping her wrist firmly while leaning down to gently press your forehead against hers.'}
{1: '1007', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png', 3: '0', 4: '0.7', 5: '0'}
{1: 'It\'s alright now, Veronica.', 3: '60', 4: 'ffffffff', 6: '1'}
{2: 'It\'s alright now, Veronica.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiDuihualiziLoopWhite.prefab', 2: '2', 5: '11'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiDuihualiziLoopWhite.prefab', 2: '2', 5: '13'}
{3: 'As you speak, thick fog begins to drift across her vision, slowly obscuring everything.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStorySlowlyCloseEye.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUiFight/FxUiShixianraodong03.prefab'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStorySlowlyCloseEye.prefab'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png'}
{3: 'Overwhelming exhaustion washes over her, and she sinks into a dazed stupor.'}
{3: 'The fog swirls and surges, engulfing the two of you as the streets, shadows, and monsters all fade away into nothing.'}
{3: 'Only the warm touch gripping her wrist remains. It feels startlingly real amid the swirling fog.'}
{3: 'A familiar sensation floods her mind, and Veronica suddenly remembers your name.'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiDuihualiziLoopWhite.prefab', 5: '11'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiDuihualiziLoopWhite.prefab', 5: '13'}
{1: 'DialogDisable'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1302.jpg'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiMovie/FxUiMovieMohu01.prefab'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiMovie/FxUiMovieMohu02.prefab'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiMovie/FxUiMovieMohu03.prefab'}
{3: 'She opens her eyes, her vision gradually focusing until she can clearly see your worried face.'}
{3: 'Instead of fog-shrouded streets, she finds herself in the room where she conducts her official duties.'}
{3: 'The surreal, otherworldly events from moments before have all faded away, as if they were nothing but illusions of an exhausted person\'s dream.'}
{3: 'Yet the warmth lingering on her wrist feels just as real as it did before.'}
{3: 'You sit beside her and grip her wrist firmly, having been there for who knows how long.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Veronica', 3: '...What are you doing here?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Veronica sits up straight and pulls her wrist away from your grasp, instantly composing herself after her abrupt awakening.'}
{3: 'You tactfully avoid dwelling on her vulnerable state during the nightmare, instead gently explaining your actions.'}
{2: 'You seemed to be trapped in some kind of nightmare just now.', 3: '189'}
{2: 'I could see you were troubled, so I took the liberty and intervened.', 3: '190'}
{2: 'I used my ability to pull you out of there.', 3: '191'}
{2: 'If I had to put it in familiar terms, you could call it mind-reading.', 3: '192'}
{2: 'Veronica', 3: 'What did you see in my dream?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'A fleeting sentiment crosses Veronica\'s eyes.'}
{2: 'Veronica', 3: 'You\'ve found your so-called "evidence" now, haven\'t you? You\'ve seen me as the "Bloodthirsty Siren".', 4: '1'}
{2: 'No, I didn\'t think that.', 3: '200'}
{2: 'I wouldn\'t pry into your past, but I didn\'t want to see you suffer alone.', 3: '201'}
{2: 'You\'re not "bloodthirsty." That was just a nightmare.', 3: '202'}
{2: 'You didn\'t do anything to me... It was all in your head.', 3: '203'}
{3: 'You raise your other wrist to show her, and indeed, there isn\'t a single mark on your skin.'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1472.jpg', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '0.8'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1472.jpg'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiFogNew.prefab', 2: '2'}
{3: 'She turns away, no longer staring intently at you, and gazes at the drifting white mist outside the window instead.'}
{3: 'Though she remains silent, you can sense the suppressed feelings hidden within her guarded heart.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Veronica', 3: 'So, do you have any leads on the case?', 4: '18'}
{2: 'Technically speaking, not yet.', 3: '216'}
{2: 'Veronica', 3: '...So you came here just to watch me make a fool of myself in that nightmare?', 4: '18'}
{2: 'No, I came because I need more information.', 3: '218'}
{2: 'Veronica', 3: 'The autopsy, the case files, and the key to the records room... You already have it all.', 4: '18'}
{2: 'Veronica', 3: 'What else do you need, "great detective"?', 4: '18'}
{2: 'Perhaps there\'s still hidden intel that I\'m not aware of.', 3: '222'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiFogNew.prefab'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1302.jpg', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '0.8'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1302.jpg'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Veronica turns back around, an unreadable flicker passing through her eyes.'}
{2: 'Veronica', 3: 'You\'re suspecting me, aren\'t you?', 4: '1'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png', 3: '0', 4: '0.8', 5: '0.3'}
{1: '1', 3: 'You don\'t rebut her accusation, instead pulling out the telegram you received regarding the commission.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'The words "Bloodthirsty Siren" stand out particularly clearly on the telegram.', 4: '1'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png', 3: '0.8', 4: '0', 5: '0.3'}
{2: 'No, I only care about the truth.', 3: '239'}
{2: 'You commissioned my detective agency to investigate the "Bloodthirsty Siren".', 3: '240'}
{2: 'But ever since I arrived here, every clue I\'ve uncovered points to one thing...', 3: '241'}
{2: 'The "Bloodthirsty Siren" doesn\'t exist.', 3: '242'}
{2: 'I\'ve been chasing a nonexistent culprit for a crime that hasn\'t happened all this time.', 3: '243'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Veronica', 3: 'What did you see in town?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'I conducted a preliminary investigation on the House of Peace before we met.', 3: '246'}
{2: 'According to their leader, it\'s just a place of spiritual sanctuary.', 3: '247'}
{2: 'But the people there mentioned a siren that has yet to exist...', 3: '248'}
{2: 'Veronica', 3: '...So you\'ve met that Roko?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Contempt fills her eyes.'}
{2: 'Do you know each other?', 3: '251'}
{2: 'Veronica', 3: 'That coward used to be a clerk under my command, but when the Mist came, he ran off without even looking back.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Veronica', 3: 'He didn\'t stay and uphold his duty to protect this town, not like Aleksei did.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Veronica', 3: 'That man is nothing more than a pathetic coward, terrified of dying in the Mist like Aleksei did.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Veronica', 3: 'Then he reinvented himself as the head of the House of Peace, leading bizarre prayers every day...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'But you still chose to spare him.', 3: '259'}
{2: 'Veronica', 3: 'My hatred has a specific target.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Veronica', 3: 'I didn\'t go after him because I didn\'t want to drag the innocent, ordinary people seeking refuge at the House of Peace into this.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Veronica', 3: 'In the Mist, all they faced was the terror of the unknown.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Veronica', 3: 'I couldn\'t take away those people\'s last shred of hope.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'That\'s why I don\'t think this is a "case" that needs investigating.', 3: '266'}
{2: 'But rather a "prophecy" that needs to be prevented.', 3: '267'}
{3: 'Her expression suddenly turns serious.'}
{2: 'Veronica', 3: 'Every night, I see those things in my dreams and hear that voice.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Veronica', 3: 'I can resist the Mist\'s influence, and I don\'t go mad like ordinary people do in there... but I can\'t escape the visions that plague my dreams every night.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Veronica', 3: 'Hah, is this "fate," then?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Veronica', 3: 'How laughable... If they think this will make me weak, make me give in...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Like you, I don\'t believe in false promises.', 3: '274'}
{2: 'Talk of "fate" is nothing more than an excuse to stop fighting.', 3: '275'}
{2: 'Me? I won\'t stop trying as long as there\'s a sliver of hope.', 3: '276'}
{3: 'You pause for a moment before suddenly breaking into a smile, your serious expression melting away.'}
{2: 'You\'d have to grow wings and fly to be a siren.', 3: '279'}
{2: 'You look nothing like that right now, don\'t you?', 3: '280'}
{2: 'Veronica', 3: '...That\'s a terrible joke.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'But she finally lets her serious expression drop, and a smile spreads across her face.'}
{3: 'She moves a little closer to you, and you two stand side by side, silently watching the white mist drift past the window.'}
{2: 'Veronica', 3: 'If there really comes a day when an Aberration like me does become the Bloodthirsty Siren...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Veronica', 3: 'I\'ll join you and your assistant, and we\'ll forge a new path forward.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Veronica', 3: 'Because I want to know what\'s really hiding in the Mist.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'As you two discuss that quirky little assistant of yours, an ominous feeling begins to creep into your mind.'}
{3: 'You realize that the girl who was practically inseparable from you seems to have been absent from your side for quite some time now.'}
{3: 'And as if responding to your concern, strange sounds drift faintly from the fog once more.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUiFight/FxUiShixianraodong01.prefab'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUiFight/FxUiShixianraodong02.prefab'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUiFight/FxUiShixianraodong03.prefab'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory752.jpg'}
{3: 'Buried under a mountain of case files and documents, Eileena is sitting bored out of her mind in her room when those eerie sounds echo through the fog.'}
{3: 'She mutters to herself as she doodles absent-mindedly in her notebook.'}
{3: 'Her pen traces circle after circle around the words "House of Peace", as if this particular puzzle piece is giving her a massive headache.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Eileena', 3: 'Hmm, let\'s put together what we know so far... The House of Peace, those strange rats, and the legendary "Bloodthirsty Siren" that supposedly doesn\'t exist...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Eileena', 3: 'Those people gathered to pray together... Don\'t tell me they were actually praying for the arrival of the "Bloodthirsty Siren"?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Eileena', 3: 'But can prayer alone be effective? Summoning rituals would require sacrificial offerings...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Eileena', 3: 'Ugh, I can\'t figure it out! It feels like I\'m missing some crucial piece of the puzzle...', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Feeling discouraged, Eileena tosses her pen aside and lies down directly on the floor, closing her eyes to think.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStoryFront/BgStoryFront79.png', 4: '4'}
{3: 'Amidst her thoughts, a strange, sharp pain suddenly pierces through her mind.'}
{3: 'Something strange seems to be twisting and entangling her mind.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUiFight/FxUiShixianraodong01.prefab'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUiFight/FxUiShixianraodong02.prefab'}
{1: '0', 2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUiFight/FxUiShixianraodong01.prefab'}
{1: '0', 2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUiFight/FxUiShixianraodong02.prefab'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStoryFront/BgStoryFront79.png', 4: '4', 5: '1'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory752.jpg', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '0.8'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory752.jpg'}
{3: 'Right then, she hears a faint sound outside her window.'}
{3: 'A rat slowly crawls onto Eileena\'s foot, its tiny claws leaving a nauseating, slimy sensation against her skin.'}
{3: 'She quickly shoos away the rat, completely unaware that a strange figure begins to emerge from the shadows outside her window.'}
{2: 'Eileena', 3: 'Who\'s there?', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 3: 'A young man stands outside her window, his silhouette somewhat familiar.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'The girl finally gets a clear look at the ghastly pale face—but this is a face that should not be appearing before her.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1159.jpg'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Because Aleksei died several days ago.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory824.jpg'}
{3: 'And Eileena was there when his remains were buried on that foggy night.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory752.jpg'}
{3: 'She instinctively steps back, but it\'s already too late.'}
{3: 'Before she can even raise her hands in defense, strange shadows emerge from every direction, rushing toward her with alarming speed.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory752.jpg'}
{3: 'By the time you and Veronica arrive at Eileena\'s room, it is already deserted.'}
{3: 'No trace of her remains. Scattered case files and documents are strewn across the floor, along with that notebook she never goes anywhere without.'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png', 3: '0', 4: '0.8', 5: '0.3'}
{1: '1', 3: 'The open notebook bears her familiar handwriting, and "House of Peace" is circled over and over again in red ink for emphasis.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Most disturbing of all are the rows of strange, filthy marks covering the notebook: grimy, bloodstained traces left by countless rat paws.', 4: '1'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png', 3: '0.8', 4: '0', 5: '0.3'}
{3: 'It seems that some sinister force took her away while she was working the case here.'}
{3: 'The handwriting, the traces of rats, and the scattered clues all click into place like puzzle pieces in your mind, pointing to the sinister House of Peace.'}
{2: 'Those people from the House of Peace took her!', 3: '402'}
{2: 'Veronica', 3: 'Those guys... I\'m done holding back.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'The sheriff grabs her lance and strides into the fog.'}
